allow: Bash(cmd /c "python -c ""import boto3; client = boto3.client\(''bedrock'', region_name=''us-east-2''\); models = client.list_foundation_models\(byProvider=''Anthropic''\)[''modelSummaries'']; [print\(m[''modelId'']\) for m in models if ''claude'' in m[''modelId''].lower\(\)]""")

Bash(cmd /c "python -c ""import boto3, json; client = boto3.client\(''bedrock'', region_name=''us-east-2''\); r = client.list_foundation_models\(byProvider=''Anthropic''\); print\(json.dumps\([m[''modelId''] for m in r[''modelSummaries'']], indent=2\)\)""")

Bash(cmd /c "python -c ""import boto3, json; client = boto3.client\(''bedrock'', region_name=''us-east-2''\); r = client.list_foundation_models\(byProvider=''Anthropic''\); print\(len\(r[''modelSummaries'']\)\); [print\(m[''modelId'']\) for m in r[''modelSummaries'']]"" 2>&1")
